meaning: n.滑稽演员adj.滑稽的,喜剧的
examples: Grodin is a fine comic actor.
The play is both comic and tragic.
He makes a living as a stand-up comic.
Stan Lee remains an integral part of the annual San Diego Comic-Con convention.
Gamers will be able to battle Eric Savin and comic-inspired villains like Titanium Man and Blizzard.
